title: Kilrock SLAM - Sink and Plughole Bathroom Drain Unblocker - Multi-Pack x12 - Dissolves Grease, Fat & Food - For Smelly Drains
features: ✓ KILROCK SLAM BATHROOM SINK AND PLUGHOLE UN-BLOCKER - One shot unblocks your Bathroom plughole with ease. 12x Shots

✓ EFFICIENT: Kilrock Slam Bathroom Plughole Unblocker rapidly eliminates severe bathroom obstructions without creating any mess or troublesome odors. Removes and dissolves hair, grease, and soap scum from drains
✓ EASY TO USE - Simply pour the contents of the sachet down the bathroom plughole, pour a litre of very hot water down and leave it for 3 minutes to work it's magic
✓ ORIGINAL KILROCK FORMULA: This powerful formula effectively tackles stubborn bathroom blockages with no mess and no fuss

✓ MADE IN THE U.K. From our factory in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, we design, formulate, blend, fill, pack, sell and distribute a full range of specialist household problem-solving and cleaning products
description: Product Description 12-pack of single dose drain unblockers — specially formulated to quickly blast through everyday bathroom blockages such soap scum and hair. Ingredients Sodium hydroxide Directions Pour the contents of one sachet down the bathroom plughole. Follow this by pouring a litre of very hot water down the drain. Allow the solution to work for 3 minutes before flushing with more water. Safety Warning May cause skin and eye irritation. Harmful if swallowed. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. In case of contact, rinse immediately with plenty of water and seek medical advice. Keep out of reach of children. Do not mix with other chemicals. Use only as directed. Dispose of contents/container in accordance with local regulations. See more
